title: Scotland-Spain-Portugal-Italy Travel Boost as Ryanair Expands at Glasgow Prestwick Airport for Summer 2026 - Travel And Tour World

sections.heading: What happened
sections.content: Ryanair launches Summer 2026 at Glasgow Prestwick with 10 routes to Spain, Portugal, and Italy, boosting Scotland's Mediterranean connectivity.

sections.heading: Key details
sections.content: Scotland-Spain-Portugal-Italy Travel Boost as Ryanair Expands at Glasgow Prestwick Airport for Summer 2026 - Travel And Tour World Home » Airlines News of Italy » Scotland-Spain-Portugal-Italy Travel Boost as Ryanair Expands at Glasgow Prestwick Airport for Summer 2026

sections.heading: Why it matters
sections.content: Scotland-Spain-Portugal-Italy Travel Boost as Ryanair Expands at Glasgow Prestwick Airport for Summer 2026 A significant boost to leisure connectivity between Scotland and key destinations in Spain, Portugal, and Italy has been announced with the launch of the Ryanair Summer 2026 programme at Glasgow Prestwick Airport . The expanded schedule has been designed to strengthen links between western Scotland and some of Europe's most sought-after sunshine and cultural hotspots. With ten routes confirmed and increased frequencies on several high-demand services, travellers from Scotland are being offered broader choice, improved flexibility, and sustained low-fare access to the Mediterranean region.
